default.title: Helpful Tip
default.body: Use the guidance on each page to move through your observation with confidence.

steps.title: Choose a focus domain
steps.body: Choose the focus domain for this observation.

steps.title: Narrow the focus
steps.body: Choose the subdomain that best matches what you noticed.

steps.title: Select key elements
steps.body: Pick one or more elements that describe the observed learning.

steps.title: Choose behaviours
steps.body: Choose one behaviour for each selected element track.

steps.title: Capture your notes
steps.body: Write a short, clear statement about what the child did, said, or showed.

steps.title: Review and finish
steps.body: Check the pathway and notes, then save or export when you're happy.
